description: Crafting, repair, sustenance, and practical tools for everyday usefulness beyond the battlefield.
powers: Unbreakable
Time and violence leave no mark. The item endures without wear, without crack, without complaint.
Faithful
The item resists being lost. It turns up in pockets, reappears on shelves, finds its way back no matter what.
Steadfast
It works. Always. Without fail, without hesitation, without the small betrayals that plague lesser things.
Weightless Carry
The item occupies no space in pack or pouch. It is there when needed and gone when not, like a useful thought.
Summoner's Call
Speak the word and the item appears in the wielder's hand. Distance means nothing to it.
Remote Trigger
The item can be activated from afar. Set it down, walk away, and speak the word when the moment is right.
Shy Vanish
When released, the item fades from sight. It waits invisibly for its owner's hand to find it again.
Shifting Form
The item grows or shrinks at a command. A needle becomes a staff, a ring becomes a crown.
Loyal Grip
No force can pry this item from its rightful owner. It clings to the hand that claimed it.
Whispercraft
Not a sound. No clatter when drawn, no ring when it strikes. Silence follows this item like a loyal companion.
Humble Guise
The item looks like nothing special. A worn tool, a dull trinket. No one would guess what it truly is.
Easy Hand
The item responds to the lightest touch. It moves with the wielder's intent, obedient and intuitive.
Feather Weight
So light it might not exist at all. The bearer forgets they carry it until the moment they need it.
Tally Keeper
Each success leaves a mark. Notches appear, gems illuminate, petals bloom. The item remembers its victories.
Master Craft
Work done with this item produces double the result. Every project finishes faster, better, more complete.
Restorer
Broken things become whole again at this item's touch. Shattered wood re-knits, bent metal straightens, cracks vanish.
Artisan's Spark
Crafted objects stir to life briefly, performing small tasks with clumsy earnestness before going still again.
Swift Work
Projects that should take days finish in hours. The item compresses labor as if time itself lends a hand.
Raw Shaping
Rough materials yield to the wielder's vision. Sticks become tools, ore becomes nails, all from what is at hand.
Nourish Touch
Food touched by this item becomes richer, more sustaining. A meager meal feeds like a feast.
Rune Scribe
The wielder etches glowing symbols that linger on surfaces. Those who read them feel a small blessing take hold.
Camp Maker
A full campsite appears at the wielder's word. Tent, fire, warmth. Everything needed for one night's rest.
Mending Thread
Torn fabric weaves itself back together at a touch. Rips seal, seams close, cloth remembers its shape.
Lantern Fill
Empty lanterns flare to life with a cold flame that needs no oil. Light without cost, warmth without fuel.
Clean Slate
Written words lift away from parchment as if they were never put there. A fresh page from a used one.
Rust Eater
Corrosion crumbles away at this item's touch. What was ruined emerges clean and bright beneath.
Iron Skin
Any surface hardens under this item's influence. Wood becomes tough as iron, cloth stiffens like plate.
Stone Shaper
Rock softens under the wielder's hands like wet clay. Push, pull, mold. Then it hardens again, reshaped.
Deep Pocket
The item holds far more than it should. A flask that pours endlessly, a pouch that swallows barrels.
Floating Disc
A hovering platform trails the wielder like a loyal pet, carrying burdens so they do not have to.
Everripe
Food in this item's presence refuses to age. Fruit stays perfect, bread stays soft, nothing spoils.
Perfect Brew
Any liquid poured through this item emerges as flawless tea. Temperature, flavor, strength. All exactly right.
Hilt Harvest
Tiny fruit grows along the item's surface, ripe and ready to eat. A small meal that returns each dawn.
Conjured Feast
A full spread of food appears at the wielder's command. Enough to feed a party, gone by morning.
Tailored Meal
The item produces a single perfect meal, exactly what the eater craves. Comfort food made manifest.
Well Spring
Fresh water erupts from the ground at this item's bidding. A deep, cool well where there was none before.
Sound Keeper
The item listens and remembers. Conversations, songs, warnings. All stored and replayed at a word.
Melody Jar
A single piece of music lives inside the item. It plays on command, note perfect, as often as asked.
Spell Vessel
The item holds a single spell in reserve, captured and waiting. Release it when the time is right.
Eternal Ember
Campfires need no wood. The item provides a flame that burns on nothing, steady and warm until dismissed.
Key Echo
Touch a key and this item remembers its shape. One touch is enough to open that lock forever after.
Lock Whisper
Locked doors reveal their secrets willingly. The mechanism speaks to the item, and the item shares what it learns.
Equivalent Trade
One small thing becomes another of equal worth. A coin becomes a nail, a button becomes a seed.
Terrain Map
A shimmering projection of the surrounding landscape appears in the air. Every path, every hill, laid bare.
Stored Sunlight
The item drinks daylight and saves it. When darkness falls, it pours out captured sun in a warm golden glow.
